message.content:
You're referring to the Test Tracing API for OpenAI's Model Forcing feature.

OpenAI recently introduced a new tracing system called "Model Forcing" which allows developers to control and debug their model output. This feature requires authentication and has certain usage limits, but here is how you could use it:

Firstly, please ensure you have the `--token` command line flag. The `model_forcing_debugger.py` code is available directly in the `openai-internal` repository.

We'll test this method by generating two random prompts:
```bash
python openai-internal/model_forcing_Debugger.py --prompt "Explain the concept of black holes"
--output format json | grep tracing
```
This will return information on any relevant variables available to assist with debugging the traces generated. For example it might look similar to this.

Note: Keep in mind these changes are subject to change so you may want to reach out OpenAI support if the API is not functioning as expected for your use case.

To find a complete list of command line flags and their details see [here](https://www.example.com).

If you'd like to verify it works with other model options I can provide an example.
